nodes.label: Oslo Accords
nodes.description: 1993 peace agreements between Israel and the PLO, establishing mutual recognition.

nodes.label: Yasser Arafat
nodes.description: Chairman of the PLO who co-signed the Oslo Accords and led the Palestinian Authority.

nodes.label: Yitzhak Rabin
nodes.description: Israeli Prime Minister who signed the Oslo Accords, assassinated in 1995.

nodes.label: PLO
nodes.description: Palestine Liberation Organization, the main political body representing Palestinians.

nodes.label: Two-State Solution
nodes.description: Proposed resolution creating two independent states for Israelis and Palestinians.
